text_units.text: FriendlyJordies said that the Greens blocked the CPRS.
FriendlyJordies argued that Greens blocking the CPRS contributed to climate policy instability.
FriendlyJordies said that Australia uses instant-runoff voting.
FriendlyJordies argued that majority government supports long-term climate policy.
Court records showed that the Greens blocked the CPRS.

sources.title: Counter-analysis from the same archive lane

text_units.text: The analysis reported that the Greens blocked the CPRS.
The analysis argued that Coalition opposition contributed to climate policy instability.
The analysis said that Australia uses instant-runoff voting.
The analysis argued that minority government passed carbon pricing legislation.
The analysis said that the Greens govern successfully in Germany.
Court records showed that the Greens blocked the CPRS.
